/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/mysql-client/lib CMakeFiles/mapmt_calibrate.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o mapmt_calibrate  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root libmapmt_calibration_lib.a /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libHist.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libMatrix.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libTree.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libMathCore.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libImt.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libMultiProc.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libNet.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libRIO.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libThread.so /opt/homebrew/opt/root/lib/root/libCore.so
